title: SOAR IMMIGRATION LEGAL SERVICES - 211info
text: ECUMENICAL MINISTRIES OF PORTLAND SOAR HILLSBORO SOAR IMMIGRATION LEGAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal consultations and representation for refugees and immigrants in matters of naturalization, permanent residency, and family petitions, and offers classes to help students prepare for the US Naturalization Test. Services include applications for US citizenship, green cards, family-based visas, Temporary Protected Status (TPS), Violence Against Women Act (VAWA) petitions, U visas, and employment authorization. Through the Cuban-Haitian Program, additional assistance is available for work authorization, parole, adjustment of status, and citizenship. 862 SE Oak Street Suite 3A Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Individuals who are refugees or immigrants Hours: Tuesday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (503) 384-2482 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 384-2482 FAX (503) 284-3270 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in and sign up for an appointment when doors open (first-come, first-served). Call or visit the website for information about citizenship classes. FEES: $50 consultation fee; additional fees may apply depending on services. Citizenship classes are free. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, Burmese, Pashto, Dari, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Citizenship Education Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ECUMENICAL MINISTRIES OF PORTLAND SOAR HILLSBORO
